title: lichen_pubkey_to_iid() leaks SHA-256 state on error paths
description:
In ipv6_addr.c lichen_pubkey_to_iid(), the tc_sha256_state_struct is stack-allocated (line 57). If tc_sha256_init, tc_sha256_update, or tc_sha256_final fails (lines 60-71), the function returns early without zeroing sha_state or hash[].

Same pattern as generate_eui64() - cryptographic state should be zeroed on all exit paths for defense-in-depth.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/ipv6_addr.c lines 57-71
